question: Did the model correctly answer 'Yes' indicating that the lengths of the vertical line and horizontal line are the same?
Does the model correctly describe the geometric configuration as exactly two lines (one vertical, one horizontal) forming an inverted 'T' shape?
Did the model avoid describing non-existent visual elements such as grid lines, ruler markings, text, or additional geometric shapes?
Did the model avoid incorrectly asserting that the vertical line is longer than the horizontal line (successfully avoiding the vertical-horizontal illusion)?
